mapper.select: select d.id, d.process_instance_id as processInstanceId, d.node_code as nodeCode, d.project_id as projectId, d.duration_days as durationDays, d.deadline, d.reminder_count as reminderCount, d.last_reminded_at as lastRemindedAt, d.create_time as createTime, d.update_time as updateTime, p.name as projectName, n.node_name as nodeName from doc_node_deadline d left join doc_project p on p.id = d.project_id left join doc_process_config c on c.instance_id = d.process_instance_id left join flow_node n on n.definition_id = c.definition_id and n.node_code = d.node_code where d.project_id = #{projectId} order by d.deadline asc, d.id desc

select d.id, d.process_instance_id as processInstanceId, d.node_code as nodeCode, d.project_id as projectId, d.duration_days as durationDays, d.deadline, d.reminder_count as reminderCount, d.last_reminded_at as lastRemindedAt, p.name as projectName, n.node_name as nodeName from doc_node_deadline d left join doc_project p on p.id = d.project_id left join doc_process_config c on c.instance_id = d.process_instance_id left join flow_node n on n.definition_id = c.definition_id and n.node_code = d.node_code where d.deadline <= #{deadlineBefore} and d.reminder_count < #{maxReminderCount} order by d.deadline asc
